review_text: Good friendly people, accomodated our needs at short notice.  Beautiful place, 50 metres from the Pacific Ocean.

Our family of 5 (kids aged 4, 6 and 8) just stayed in a Surf Villa for 5 nights and had a wonderful time. We were so well-entertained at the park that once we had collected our groceries on day 1, we only left the park for the short walk to the (absolutely beautiful) beach. The jumping pillow, playground and pool/waterslides are awesome, and the additional daily activities were great too. Huge thank you to the all of the staff for creating a kind, fun and welcoming culture. We hope to return again!

just spent 4 nights here over Easter in one of the cabins next to the pool and water slide. Perfect spot to relax for a few days. Staff friendly and helpful. Very family friendly. short walk to the beach. Highly recommend

Lovely helpful reception lady. Lovely dog friendly park.
Very clean cabin.

Cabin stunk and the management allowed a “ family reunion “ . You don’t go to a caravan park for a party! They had approx 6 cabins booked and music was played loud from Friday night till Saturday late night!. I won’t be going back
Beat caravan Park in Nambucca

Very disappointed!
Multiple disruptions with water in what resulted in no water for an extended period….

appeared clean only to wake up Riddled with bites what could have been bed bugs /mosquitos !

Slide was another sore point of our stay with it not being available after 5pm when there was still hours of sunlight!
Kids were not happy !

Unfortunately would not reccomend ! Very poor experience ….

This park definitely needs some attention, upon arrival the water to the entire park was disrupted 3 times …. being there for a sporting event not being able to shower was not ideal , all amenities, were affected, no washing machines were available for use, not your typical Big 4 standard !!
Schöne Location. Man braucht ein Fahrzeug. Schöner Beach. Sauber

There was a weirdo walking around in a g string and a nose ring watch out for your kids he is a permeermet resident in the park I think,he was in the shower playing with him self, all I can say is good luck at this dirty park
Overnight stay only we had the beach hut kids were excited very clean and good amenities

Beautiful park with natural surroundings. The staff were friendly and helpful. We're new to caravanning asked for assistance to get on and off the site, the guy (sorry didn't get his name) who help us was absolutely fantastic. Thank you.

honestly we travel a lot in  our van and we felt this caravan park was so good! the kids were all playing together like the days when we were kids… a whole group of kids playing from different ages and no ipad insight. the kids were so excited to go out and play ! the park gave lots of stuff to do for the kids and a safe environment that we could relax that they weren’t going to far.

The park is quite small, they photos look nothing like the park.|Kids had a good time, and beaches are beautiful.|The ladies in the office are so unfriendly, especially the two younger one.|Quite rude|Our air conditioning was not working, I informed them straight away. They got someone to look at it, and never heard a thing from there. |We stayed for 5 days with no air conditioning and they didn’t care.|The kids play here is a disgrace nothing works.|So I would never return or recommend the place.
My son loves to Go 🚶‍♀️

Great place to stay if you have kids. Easy check in, the staff were friendly.
We stayed in the beach house. We did find the parking tight and tricky between the cabins, especially if you have a big car.
Will definitely be back
Really nice view, rooms are fully clean and everything. Only downside was that they did not let us use the swimming because it was raining

We had a nice stay here with our 2 kids. The waterside was good and kept the kids entertained. The staff were very friendly and helpful. The park does need some investment The games room is almost non functioning as most things are broken or not working and there is not alot of options either. Close to the beach which is good and the on-site unsuite  was
good enough for us!
Beautiful spot! Heaps of beach access points from the park (very short walk)! Awesome pool and water play for the kids! Clean park. Will be back. Reasonably priced. Dog friendly too.
All sites have fake grass which awesome so much cleaner. We had the ensuite site which was clean and modern. This is a quiet park in amongst nature will definitely be back again loved it
Such a beautiful park, right on the beach ⛱️ staff were very friendly

Cute little park close to the beach. Lots of permanents driving fast around the park. Our site was in the middle on a slope so really wasn’t very friendly for young kids as it was also on a blind corner. We were on high alert that a car wasn’t turning the corner while the littilies are out playing. Such a shame the only way in and out for the residents is the same road our kids are riding bikes on. We also weren’t told about the renovations, not even on check in. Then when we went to the amenities we saw they were fenced up. Strange bit of info to leave out.

Great beach access powered site with astro turf. We weren't told about the amenities being closed for renovations upon booking, they do have porta loos, but only 1 shower for females and 1 for males, not the end of the world, great park with friendly staff, will be back
Great dog friendly family cabins, pool.and waterpark always a winner. My kids just love everytime we visit.

Location was great, only a short walk to the beach.  We had the two storey elevated villa which gave us plenty of privacy while still being centrally located by the pool, with parking underneath for both cars. The villa had everything we needed for a lovely weekend. |The only issue was the shower and bath combination tap in the bathroom, if you had the shower tap on the bath tap would run at the same time and couldn't be turned off. |Bed was comfortable,  room was clean and spacious. |Unfortunately the reception for Netflix was sub standard and kept cutting out and wouldn't load.|But, we enjoyed our weekend.

Needs a total revamp!! Very dated cabin. Way overpriced for what we got.  Horrible,musty smell when we arrived. Miniature tv is a joke!! Tiniest bathroom,  and difficult to get in as vanity encroaches into doorway! Choose somewhere else!!

Pet friendly family unit was super clean and spacious. The pool area is so great, kids (and adults) had fun with the slides, and the BBQ area next to the jumping pillow kept the kids entertained while we cooked dinner.
Only a few minutes drive from everything, or a nice beach walk to the surf club for breaky/lunch.

This place was adorable. A very pleasant stay. Comfortable and cute, and located a stroll away from a beautiful white sand beach. We enjoyed our stay here. It's usually for family and kid focused, but we came during winter so that part was not available. But that was fine it was quiet and I like quiet.
Great place to relax

Little gem of a park, booked for a quick run up for weekend from Sydney to visit family. We will be back, this parks well set up for kids and is peaceful enough that the adults get a nice break too!
Cabins are well appointed, clean, and comfortable, at a great price.

What an amazing place.
Love lovelovethe joint

Really enjoyed our stay here, nice quiet park, beach access from the park where we enjoyed a swim and spotted whales swimming by! Only downfall is the pool had lots of hair in it and we were not given any towels for our ensuite site
This is such a lovely place to stay lots of activities for all the family really enjoyed.  The staff are very friendly  and helpful

Lovely quiet park. We stayed in a dog friendly cabin. The off leash dog beach on your back door was amazing. Visit the The Island Restaurant at the Golf Course. Able to sit on the deck with water views with your pooch.
Lovely quiet park. We had a dog friendly cabin which was comfortable. The bonus is the off leash dog beach on your doorstep

Firstly i would like to say thanks  to the lovely reception  lady..
This place is a lovely  little place to stay  especially  with kids and pets.
When we got here we were given a pet friendly   studio
It was awful. I wanted to burst into tears.
Nothing like the photos
Curtains mould  on them
Outside dirty mouldy furniture.
Bathroon  a disgraceful
Kitchen old
Chairs to sit on old a d looked dirty
Floor  dirty Nowhere to hang or put clothinvgaway
I wouldnt have stayed for free
However  we complained  and got a 2 bedroom  pet friendly  which was like chalk and cheese
We were told that it would cost another  140 dollars for the 3 nights
But we were given the 2 bedroom  at no extra  cost.

Nice little drmecked area outside
Roomy living area. Good size kitchen.
Good size bed plenty  if cupboard  space
Bathroom and laundry tub  old but clean
You can hear the sea from the Park which is nice dog friendly beach which is beautiful a few minutes walk away
There shoukd  be signs for people to pick their  dog poo up
As a pet owner i was  disgusted how .many people didnt
As a pet owner  maybe signs for these lazy people  not picking poo ip
But the studio 1 A dont even bother to book it .
Thankfully  there  was a spare  cabin as we were  there mid week
If not we  wouldn't  have stayed there.  And asked ti be refunded
Good  for kids. Lots to do
The caravan sites looked  nice
If you hav a dog
Pick you dog poo up  there are kids on this park
Maybe  some  bins would  help  on the grassed area  before  you walkto the beach as there are family  cabins, the last thing people need is that for their kids  to steo in
Thanks to the manager for changing our  cabin

If you are booking a pet friendly  studio do not book 1 lA
It needs a complete  renovation.
Its horrible

We did a last minute overnight stay from Sydney to Brisbane towing a vehicle. Hayley  - Manager, was so incredibly helpful with accommodating us and our vehicles - we are so appreciative of her help. Our daughter (3yo) loved the pool and blow up bouncing pillow - her favourite stay out of our trip! We will be back!
Bit out of the way, but lovely spot

We booked 2 bedroom 4 person accommodation, it was one proper bedroom with single bunks in the small passageway outside the toilet/shower. Definitely not enough room for 4 adults. Quite disappointing.
The property was beautiful though

Big spaces for your car and caravan.
Onsuits better option
Park was ok but the staff need to think a bit more where they put the larger vans

Great stay. Spent one night in cabin 2A. Spacious, clean linen and towels. Front desk service was really good. 50m walk to the beach with private access right behind the cabin. Great location. We'll be back again for a longer stay and with the doggos. Cheers team!
Very nice. Cosy and beautiful

Sent to occupied sites twice.
Requested adjacent sites, but we were given separate ones.
When I requested 2 specific sites, I was told they were already booked. No one used them.
Nice grounds.
Narrow sites.
Very close to a beautiful beach.
First time here, I like it more relaxing and quiet.

After a mix up with our original booking, Demi was amazing in sorting out a lovely cabin for us. A very efficient and positive young lady !
Thanks Demi !

This was our first time at this park. We had a caravan site for 8 nights, plus our son used the pet friendly cabin for 2 nights.
The staff were very friendly and it was a credit to the manager to have such great staff.
We will definitely be back.

We recently stayed at BIG4 Tasman Holiday Park – Nambucca Heads and absolutely loved it! The park is beautifully maintained and has a truly welcoming, family-friendly atmosphere. The park managers were incredibly friendly and helpful, making us feel right at home. Being right on the beach is such a bonus – perfect for morning walks and sunset views. This park has everything you need to create wonderful holiday memories. Highly recommended!
Very dirty, amenities even had maggots on the male toilet floor. No or not much phone or internet coverage. Rubbish bins filled to overflowing.

Beds were terrible!! We cut our trip short one night due to the beds being so uncomfortable.

Management response to my email:
So sorry to hear the beds were unconfutable, next time if you come to the office and let us know we can change the mattress over, we are always accommodating to people’s requests and willing to move things around so that your stay is positive.
As we don’t sleep in the beds, we can only go off guests feedback, thank you for letting us know.

Non of the staff offered anything or the option to change the mattress when I advised we were going to check out early because of the beds.

Now that I’ve read the reviews, the management should already be aware of the terrible beds.

Other than that, the cabin was tidy and kids enjoyed the waterslides.

However for the price, I wouldn’t stay there again.
Maggots were found daily on the toilet floors and walls. Not much offered on school holidays for kids. Pool very run down and out dated. Park needs work considering the price you pay

This place has so much going for it — fantastic facilities, a beautiful setting, and everything you need for a great family getaway. The park is well-maintained, the amenities are clean, and the vibe is super relaxed. Kids loved it, and so did we… for the most part.

The only real letdown? The beds. Honestly, they were some of the most uncomfortable I’ve slept on — lumpy, saggy, and just not what you’d expect from a place that gets everything else so right.

If they upgrade the mattresses, this could easily be a 5-star stay. Still worth a visit — just maybe bring a mattress topper or a sense of humour.
Great staff helped out with getting our extra long set up on and off the site, and only 1 min walk to beach!
Love love love this park and would go back tomorrow. Great caravan sites, peaceful but awesome for kids too. Clean and friendly. Extremely ambient atmosphere

We stayed in a beach hut (#1). Access to the beach is exceptionally close; just a short stroll on the beach track and the beach itself is divine. The accommodation faces away from the busy-ness of the rest of the park and is reasonably private though this particular hut is situated right next to the games room. The facilities are reasonably contemporary and clean, however the grey roller blinds need to be updated as upon rolling them down, they were both dirty and mouldy. The photos provided give the impression of something significantly larger; it is in fact quite small, particularly for a family of four. Overall, I am happy with this accommodation though would probably limit my stay to no longer than 1 night.
Great little park, if your staying in a cabinonly id suggest grabbing a xtra dooner to put on the bed it helps not to feel the springs in the mattress thats the only down side.
Great spot, great facilities, great staff, secluded but only 5 minutes from the shops, a few steps to the beach. Definitely will stay again
Beautiful park lots of trees and shade all the van sites had artificial grass and the whole park was very neat and clean. Loved the pool and water slides. We will definitely be back.
I stay here a lot, great for kids. Watch when driving around as nobody has car sense. Kids run out from behind things onto the road. We're are the parents?.

It's location is perfect in terms of being close to beach and not too far from motorway.
Water slides are fun and keeps the children busy. That's all we needed from our drive from Sydney to Brisbane. Stayed there for a night. Limited restaurants nearby so get in early as things get quiet pretty quickly.
Beds were okay.
No complaints really.

Fantastic Stay in a Spacious, Well-Equipped Cabin Near the Beach!

We had a wonderful stay in this cabin, made even better by a complimentary upgrade upon arrival. The cabin was spacious, clean, and well-equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Its location was perfect—just a short walk to the beach, making it ideal for a relaxing getaway. We highly recommend this place and would definitely stay again!

Never never again. I don’t even know where to start. This place was filthy, dusty and unsafe cut my feet on the floor because it was falling apart. The pool dirty got a text about a faecal incident and that we couldn’t use the pool and the worst thing is that this cabin was even more expensive than a 5 star hotel. Mouse feces and mold everywhere built up dust everywhere. I can go on and on. But please have a look at the pictures and my written review isn’t even needed.

$249 for 1 night powered caravan site with 2 Adults no pets or children is excessive considering recent poor reviews, we are glad we chose to keep driving. We have had great water side sites for $40 to $70 per night down the coast.
I'm sorry but $179 for one night at your smallest tent site?? That's insane to charge people that.

Honestly I cannot put into words my Familys Experience at Tasman Nambucca, Hayley & Leigh have created a magical getaway for all familys big or small, evan those passing by for a over night stay, Our Cabin was cleaned to perfection when we arrived, & the park it self is so well kept it just felt nice to enjoy the park itself, the pool area is ideal with two fun slides for the kids and a jumping pillow and nestled right on the beach there's literally nothing more you could want, Evan with issues that arised over our stay, they where managed straight away and very professionally, My only suggestion is how much you can see the Park Mangers need assistance, they practically run the park on the own and very muchly need another hand in the office and out in the park. But evan in saying that, they still make the park run as close to perfection as possible, the Pedal Karts are a great distraction, the Goanna Cave is a great chill zone for the kids, and even the laundry amenities in our situation with a big family were very easy to manage our washing, all in all an amazing stay at Tasman Nambucca and loved the proximity to everything we needed, 100% recommend checking out this amazing park, Thank you again for making our Holiday so amazing!

Our favourite place to stay, we've been coming for years now. A smaller park that is quiet & easy to get around. Super kid friendly with great play spaces, good pool facilities with 2 slides and a kids club area. Camping is easy with clean & comfortable hygiene facilities. The 2 styles of cabins we've stayed in have been great, comfortable and clean with good kitchens & lounge. Super close to the beach, and not more than a 5 minute drive to great cafes & eateries in Nambucca. Good for both a quick stop over and for a longer settled stay.

This is a good halfway point if your travelling to Sydney or vice versa to break up the trip. We arrived after 5pm, but check in was simple. The cabin was comfortable and there is shampoo/body and hand wash provided. No washers tho. Towels are provided. There were only 2 minor things. If your short like me, the glasses, coffee cups are up high and hard to reach. And the 2nd thing was the bed was so hard and uncomfortable if you have a bad back. Apart from that, it's situated well and super close to the beach and pool. We would stay again.

Well laid out park.
Good facilities for younger children.
Large grassed area between the cabins and the beach to walk your dog.
Walk through the bushes to the beach.
Beautiful but Narrow van sites.

Ein sehr schöner, sonniger und ruhiger Ort um zu campen. Kurzer interessanter Weg zum Sandstrand. Einzigartig was es hier zu sehen gibt. Wenn man Glück hat wie wir, kann man am Ende des Camp Parks frei lebende Kängurus beobachten.
A sensational place to stay, the facilities are great, the staff awesome and the location is brilliant.

We absolutely loved our stay here! The drive thru sites were perfect with artificial grass and lots of trees so you didn't feel like you were always chasing some shade. The park amenities were clean with plenty of toilets and showers as well as a separate baby bath. Plenty of activities for the kids as well as a beautiful beach just a short walk thru the trees. The staff were friendly and accommodating. Just a short drive to some stunning beaches and lookouts. Would highly recommend if you're looking for a peaceful beachside getaway!

Loved the park environment.. lots tropical trees and excellent proximity to off-leash dog beach. We were in a camper van. Downsides were really poor wi-fi...like old dial up and fell over constantly. And while we understand the park needs maintenance, it was a bit much enduring a blasting pressure-hose cleaning of the roadway and a bobcat excavator and band-saw at 9am.
Great area for dogs, bit too far to shops if you don't have a car, clean park and amenities, lots of things for the kids
Fabulous place, very close to the beach, super child friendly 😁

Stayed in a bathing box for 4 nights.  Perfect for budget accommodation,  just what you need.  The park itself was great,  the kids had constant fun between the pool, water slides,  goanna Cove, jumping pillow, playground and beach.
Amenities were clean.  School holiday activities were a great inclusion,  particularly the disco night.
Right near the beach. Leash free for dogs. Room was clean and had everything I needed. Able to park my car right in front of the cabin.

Just when we needed it, a truly restful and comfortable cabin, equipped with everything imaginable.  The park itself is lovely and beautifully located.  The parking spaces between cabins are a bit tight but, apart from that, we really had no complaints.  The best shower ever!  Thoughtfully equipped and beautifully clean.

Really quiet, tucked away near the beach.
A small park with lots of colourful cabins.
A short drive to shops. A great retreat.

We stayed on a caravan ensuite site. Nice position and lovely and quiet. Site was small though, and neighbours were close. Luckily they were nice. Had no TV for over 24 hrs and no wifi signal. No information from office. Park has the rickety bridge at the entrance which looked quite unsafe. It’s a long way from shops, coffee, anything really.|Ensuite was large and well equipped but had a shower curtain which I hate.|Beautifully positioned on the beach though and we enjoyed that.|Pool was nice but not cleaned. A nice week was had despite the downsides.|Weather was great which helped.
Short walk to the beach. Quiet and peaceful. Rooms where clean and comfortable
Wet easy to check in. Super friendly and helpful staff.
What a beautiful oasis. Very quiet and relaxing. Great amenities. Short stroll to the beach.

We had a great stay on our family holiday, with 3 families staying in both campsites and in a new cabin. We all enjoyed our stay and had a great time. The cabin was beautiful and very new.

The location is great, right on the beach. We went out each morning to watch the dolphins at sunrise.

Being August it was still a bit cooler but that didn't stop the kids using the waterslides and swimming in the solar heated pool.

The park is on the smaller side with most of the back park being residential. We liked it though and the kids had a ball.

Would visit again!
Ridiculous prices, goto valla beach Park half the price and so much better.

Disappointed with our first choice of pet friendly cabin - en-suite studio cabin - rundown and old… different to how the photos looked. We changed to a Family Villa. Although this was better, it still could have done with an update - it was expensive for what we got. Main bedroom is small, nowhere to place bags or hang clothes. Bathroom also small. The outdoor lounge cushions are in need of new covers as the zips were broken and cushions dirty, as was the front deck. |The second bedroom is a reasonable size with a small wardrobe. The lounge area is roomy. We found the staff were friendly and accommodating.  Also wanted to say the new cabins on the side of the beach are fresh and brand new and look more accommodating but it’s disappointing that none of them will be pet friendly cabins.

After Being on the road for 5 weeks this was a special find. A quiet Park only steps from the beach. Clean facilities,  no noise , and the most friendly management.
After our first night our car broke down with our roof top tent on top, and towed away. Hayley whom is management did all she could to help us by opening up a cabin and hosting us a extra night , even down to offering us whatever cooking utensils we needed.
11/10 for service we will definitely be returning to this park and telling our family and friends.

Looking for accommodation for all families and prefer relaxing nights away from the busyness of life. Then Tasman Holiday park in Nambucca Heads is the only place to stay.

We stayed one night on a site and the kids loved the place. With beach access we also explore the sand finding crabs. Perfect winter stop over on our travels.
Cabin was smaller than expected for the price I paid. Very clean though. Staff lovely.

The park amenities are in big need of a makeover. The are old and not very clean (Mould and cobwebs). Two nights in a row we missed out on hot showers and was told “Sorry the kids had too many showers”. The park wasn’t even close to being full… How does this go when it’s full? The site was nice, however there was no grey water drain…

We stayed only for a night while traveling through. The team were excellent to communicate with, the activities were fun with the water slides being a favourite of the kids. Our accommodation was perfect for one night and access to the camp kitchen and toilets was easy. The location is fantastic and we wished we could stay longer.
A beautiful park, lovely and quiet, you can easily walk to the beach ⛱️

Wanted to say it was great but unfortunately that would be a lie.

It was a wet & fairly cool night when we got in
Fri 7.6.24, the fan in the main bedroom was on flat out.

We thought we’d put the air con on for 5 mins while we ate dinner & had showers just to take the chill out of the cabin but when we stood in front of the AC unit, about to turn it on, we noticed something like a dust thread/ spider web hanging out of the corner, so opened the front face / filter cover & found this……….
Absolutely unacceptable & atrocious !!!!!! Filthy, unhealthy & disgraceful!!!!! These filters don’t look like they’ve been cleaned since before 2019BC!!!!
Given the recent years of the Covid Pandemic in addition to general airborne & droplet borne respiratory viruses, this AC unit is the filthiest I’ve ever seen.
Needless to say we didn’t turn the AC on, went to bed in a cold room & bed, choosing to leave early the following morning.
I hope for future guests this issue is addressed
Cabins are quite nice have everything you need.  Park facilities are good good play area for kids good pool area which includes water slides you also have access to the beach from the park
We stayed at Tasman Nambucca, last weekend , the new managers put on a sausage sizzle with Bob the musician singing , what a great night we had , all up dancing , we had a great night
Very clean and staff were amazing

Beautiful smaller holiday park perfect for families with young kids! The waterslides were a huge hit! We stayed over Easter when the park was a capacity and despite it being full still found the location just out of town to be very peaceful.
The staff were very helpful and friendly. The campsites were well maintained and the amenities on offer despite being older were very clean and well kept. We were extremely impressed and will definitely be returning!
Just make sure if your camping you pack your outside stuff away or you may find a giant gonna helping himself to it.

Stayed here for 3 nights. Never again! 1st night we were told to keep it down while playing cards at 10pm, mind you in the dark because all 3 cabins we hired None of the porch lights worked. 2nd day the water slide was closed down because kids were having to much fun, with that text messages all day started. About no loud music. No loud TV's. Water slide being closed. Next day went to get fresh linen which was closed. So used the dryer to dry some towels which is coins only to which the coin machine does not work. After putting towels in for 50 mins they were still damp, had no extra coins to dry again. Went to take the kids to play room at 8pm after our day out and dinner finished, that was closed. To then take them to the jumping pillow also deflated. Buggy runs 10am - 3pm only so once you return from a day out it's more than likely closed. Also toy area most things are "out of order". People go on holidays to enjoy themselves not to have stricked curfews and nothing working. Lighten up!!

Unfortunately our family holiday was not a good experience.

Our invited guests were questioned by staff and made feel uncomfortable, we were then advised by management that any guest visiting us for the day to bbq or swim in the pool should be charged $12 per person. Mind you we'd payed over nine hundred dollars for our cabin for five nights.
Management also knocked on our cabin at 8:30 pm asking that our visitors leave.

The cabin itself had dirty pots and pans and unsatisfactory cutlery for use.

The bathroom had mould in the grout of the shower and torn lino in the bathroom.

The TV in the cabin was outdated and unable to connect to wifi for netflix or any other streaming services.

Our mobile phones were on SOS or very little signal in certain places and the parks wifI signal was very weak and at times unable to load a webpage. Thus making it difficult to keep in touch with family or make calls.

Overall it was a disappointing and unsatisfactory experience,  the current manager seems to lack customer service skills and experience.

We booked out early and checked in elsewhere where we felt we could enjoy our family visits and bbqs without a nosy manager watching our every move.
Fantastic caravan park. Right next to the beach. Very quiet. Multitude of bird life.
We stay at a lot of caravan parks and I was super impressed with the level of communication with this team.  Well done.  The park itself well maintained and good large sites.
We had 3 nights in our van on a premium beach reserve site. Spacious site with synthetic grass.
The best powered site for a ground tent we have used. Synthetic grass and spacious. Exclusive access to the beach is great. The men's bathroom has a bad smell. Good overall experience.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Tasman Holiday Park Nambucca Heads

We had an ensuite caravan site for 6 nights. Our site was situated in a nice spot at the end of a row of sites

The site was spacious and allowed us to spread out and still have our car on site with plenty of room. The ensuite was clean and all in working order

The slides were great for the kids, pool and playground was cleaned daily. The kids room had some claw machine type games, a pool table, car racing game , air hockey and a tv. There was also a little hidden movie theatre with an arvo movie each day

School holiday activities were run each day from a scavenger hunt to rock art and bingo

Staff were helpful and good with the kids

All in all a great trip
Love this park, always a great stop for us. so close to beach, friendly staff, great cabins

It was just perfect. I am so thankful for the accommodation, the facilities, the great activities for the children. Mostly for the outstanding service. Nothing was too much trouble for the team. Everyone went out of their way to accommodate any request. I felt extremely special being at guest at your beautiful park.

Terrific! Accomodation was excellent. Loads of activities for the kids, fantastic water slide & pool area, all right next to the beach. I would absolutely recommend this park to anyone wanting a family holiday.
Turfed powered sites for camping, clean BBQ, kids play room, water slides, swimming pool, jumping pillow.
Visited a friend in the park.  Well looked after and great location.

Great park for the kids, great pool and play area.
Rooms are clean and shower and toilet for camping are clean as well. Can access beach from park.
A few sandflies so bring the aeroguard
Great spot near beach. Old but clean. Good camping sites. Protected from westerly sun.

Fantastic dog friendly accommodation and short, flat walk to the dog friendly beach. Update: Nov 2023.. Our third stay here. The
dog friendly cabin we stayed in was spacious and had a gated verandah. Not fans of the new mattress in the main bedroom it's really soft and sinķs in the middle. But we'll be back again as we love this place

Its advertised as pet friendly but they are far from it, you pay for a site and pay for the facilities but are unable to use them to the full potential. The park is old and run down, the cleaning is very poor there is soap buildup in all the basins and showers. The new staff are rude and there is no repour building, no friendliness, the park needs to be updated and come into the 21st century need to install card readers in the laundry rather than needing to source 4 x $1 coins.

We have been coming here for over 4 years with upwards of 20 friends and family and next year we will be looking for other accommodation.
Airwomen in room will not cool. To bloody hot

Super schöner Campingplatz, überall Palmen, tropisch, toll bewachsen, direkt am Strand - was will man mehr?!  die Duschen sind ein bisschen in die Jahre gekommen aber trotz allem war alles sauber und ordentlich ein ganz toller Campingplatz, wir haben gleich verlängert 💛 achso und der Pool ist beheizt 👍🤩

I was travelling with my dad and two small dogs on the way from Melbourne to move to qld and needed an overnight stay. We called around lunch and managed to just snag a pet friendly cabin. We were towing a box trailer and there was room for the car and trailer which was great. The pet friendly cabin had a little gate at the front so the dogs could be on the front deck safely and contained. The park was a little squished but still had everything you need and was right on the beach. There were heaps of dogs around and the cabin was so good, heaps of room and slept about 5 people with 2 bedrooms and 2 couches. Modern, good kitchen, big fridge, and had a camp kitchen not far too. It's situated in a sleepy fishing village type suburb so is a little tucked away but still had a woollies and a delicious kebab shop in town.
Lovely Park staff very helpful

Park in an amazing setting, decent pool and water slides. We caravan stayed.
Facilies ok too. Quite and out of the hustle.
My main negative with this place is the lack of speed humps, people just don't listen, cars were flying through this park.(I think there are some long stay people up the back) who come and go like regulars. We were pretty anxious at this park with the little kids at the time. (4, 2).

I stayed in one of the bathing boxes and really enjoyed my stay. Staff are all lovely and park has great facilities always kept clean. Short stroll to the beach and short drive to shops etc. recommend 👍
A well looked after park

Great place to stay, the kids love the pool and slides.

The only down side was the main bedroom mattress needs replacing as it is old and horrible to sleep on.
Excellent modern clean cabin only 50m from the beach.
What a beautiful, secluded, pretty park this was, we loved our stay, especially how easy it was to walk to the beach, highly recommend
Hands down best cabin we have stayed in Australia wide. We will make this our permanent stop now - thanks to the Ladies in reception.

We stayed only a night, but enjoyed this place very much. We discovered it by accident. It is well tacked away on an end of a road close to the beach.
It has walking access to the beach.
There is a park for children, heated swimming pool and 2 slides with heated water.

There is forest next to it and there are lots of plants growing around the cabins, a very good and neat setup.

The service is great as well!
Showers are very good and have hot water for a good warm up before going to sleep.
We had a wonderful experience.. Kids outdoor activities were great, exceptional accommodation with prompt customer service.
Great family friendly facilities. Nice cabins and lovely staff. Heated pool and slides for the kids. Pool could be warmer in winter 😀

We had our caravan and  booked a site with an ensuite bathroom.  I was amazed at how big it was and really clean. Definitely made those late night trips to the toilets with kids a whole lot easier. The park itself was beautiful  and quiet. We didn't get to explore much of the park this time but we book again next time we are up that way.

I went camping here a couple years ago and the bathrooms were beyond dirty. It was extremely unclean and so was the pool at the time. It was so filthy that we decided to not return again but other than that it was ok-ish

Park is very attractive & well located. When I called the lady was very helpful. When I explained that I was in a wheelchair she booked an accessible cabin for us.

Unfortunately upon arrival we discovered that accessible simply meant 2 grab rails in the bathroom.

The bedroom is too small to get a wheelchair into it, and the only way to get into the bathroom was via the bedroom. Luckily we were only there one night. The park really needs to stop advertising accessible accommodation.

Wonderful park, stayed in a bathing box which was so cute.  Pool was great, beach was 1 minute walk.
Will be going back again
Very friendly and helpful staff.  The park was beautiful, the sites large and the fake grass was fabulous. Well done !!!!
